# My Living Canvas — Salem, OR
> My Living Canvas is a licensed tattoo studio in Salem, Oregon offering custom tattoos, cover-ups, and bilingual (English/Spanish) service. 392 Liberty St. Call (503) 884-4043. Book a free consult. A downtown studio on Liberty St with evening appointments.

## Services
- Custom tattoos
- Cover-ups
- Fine-line & blackwork
- Flash & walk-ins

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 884-4043 · Hours: Mon–Fri 3–8:30pm · Sat–Sun closed (by appt) · Languages: English, Español
